title: atalantia roxburghiana var. kwangtungensis
intro: Atalantia roxburghiana var. kwangtungensis, also known as the Kwangtung atalantia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Atalantia roxburghiana var. kwangtungensis include its potential to treat various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
